userMessage: remove meas from meas 4 to meas 8

response.text:
Meas 4 through Meas 8 are gone.

What’s on screen now:
- Plot 1: Eye Diagram for Meas 1, showing a wide open eye on Ref 1.
- Plot 2: TIE Spectrum for Meas 1 with several discrete peaks.
- Plot 3: TIE Histogram for Meas 1 centered near 0 ps.
- Plot 4: Bathtub for Meas 1.
- Waveform View below the eye plot showing the Ref 1 waveform.

Measurement table at top left:
- Only Meas 1 is listed.
- It is labeled Jitter Summary on Ref 1.
- Visible results include DR about 2.5008 Gb/s, PL(UI) 40, TIE(o), TJ@, and RJ.

Right-side results pane:
- Meas 1: Jitter Summary with detailed jitter components.
- Meas 2: Period, mean about 1.066 ns.
- Meas 3: Frequency, mean about 1.106 GHz, sigma about 298.4 MHz.

Status bar:
- Ref 1 at 200 mV/div
- 20 GS/s
- Horizontal 200 ns/div
- Acquisition Single

So the extra measurements 4–8 were successfully removed from the display.
